findings_resolved: Create used fixed repayment months, due month, and agreement timestamp instead of user terms.
Hydration trusted stored sealed/proof/root fields instead of failing closed on modified local content.
Settlement failed after an abandoned create flow cleared the denormalized active sealed record.
The decimal golden adapter lacked a verified Pilot-safe per-record principal boundary.
The first cap also blocked valid aggregate formatting above the per-record limit.
Zero or underfunded scheduled principals could create unshareable zero-halalah installments.
Persisted settlement output was not recomputed from consented local records.
The first installment invariant incorrectly rejected intentionally schedule-free open Ahd records.
